fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Four Wheeler. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Make the four wheeler drive forward in a straight line"
"Get the vehicle to do a slow turning manoeuvre"
"Make it reverse and come to a smooth stop"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Increase the wheel friction so it grips the ground better"
"Show me how the suspension behaves over a bumpy surface"
"Adjust the vehicle mass and see how it affects handling"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a second four wheeler to the scene"
"Give the vehicle a roof or cargo box on top"
"Add speed and steering sliders to the control panel"
